positive: A stylized, vibrant illustration featuring a central motif of a graceful, leaping celestial fox spirit (kitsune) rendered in a minimalist, elegant silhouette style. The fox is surrounded by stylized floral elements, glowing magical geometric patterns, and delicate wind-swept scrollwork. The color palette should be deep indigo, iridescent teal, vibrant gold, and creamy off-white. Composition must be central and balanced, designed for high contrast and pop on fabric. Flat vector aesthetic with rich gradients and defined linework, emphasizing clean, graphic separation between elements. Studio lighting, perfect symmetry, high detail illustration.
